'''Pixolga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served the [[Anti-Artist Federation]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by the [[Pixelito Art Guild]] for claiming that painted paw prints by a tamed [[Nexu/Legends|nexu]] did not constitute true art. His accusations had resulted in severe profit loss. His bounty worth 6,000 credits alive, and only 3,000 credits dead, was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
